name: Baked Corn Pudding with Crisp Crumbs (Mandel)
recipeIngredient: 2 cups corn kernels, cut from cobs
2 tablespoons masa harina OR yellow cornmeal
recipeInstructions:
CORN PUDDING. Combine corn kernels, green onions, creamed corn, oil, masa harina or yellow cornmeal, egg, milk, cumin and salt in a 1-quart bowl and stir until well mixed. Transfer to shallow greased 4-cup casserole.
TOPPING. Toss crumbs with melted butter. Season with salt to taste. Sprinkle evenly over Corn Pudding.
Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit until golden brown and sizzling, about 50 minutes. Serve hot.
